title: 5 Tips for Smooth Customs Clearance
excerpt: Avoid costly delays and extra charges with these expert customs clearance tips from our logistics specialists.
content:
## 1. Know Your HS Codes

Harmonized System (HS) codes determine your applicable duty rates. Incorrect codes can trigger audits and delays.

## 2. Prepare Documents in Advance

Have your commercial invoice, packing list, and bill of lading ready before the shipment arrives.

## 3. Declare Accurately

Under-declaration leads to penalties, seizures, and blacklisting. Always declare the true value.

## 4. Use a Licensed Customs Broker

AGC Global Express provides licensed customs brokerage. Our experts save time and money.

## 5. Plan for Lead Time

Add 3-5 business days buffer for customs clearance in your delivery commitments.
